# Vehium Documentation

> Vehium is a garage management platform for auto-repair workshops and vehicle owners. It runs on web, desktop (Windows/macOS via Electron), iOS, and Android. This site is the public, end-user documentation.

Vehium has two end-user apps:

- **Vehium Workshop** (the **workshop** app) — used by mechanics, service advisors, and garage owners to manage clients, vehicles, service orders, employees, and reports. App bundle: `com.atheod.BurnoutOSPortal`. Linked at `app.vehium.com`.
- **Vehium** (the **customer** app for **vehicle owners**) — used to see service history, receive MOT reminders, get push notifications from their garage, upload vehicle photos, and manage their account. App bundle: `com.atheod.BurnoutOSCustomer`. Linked at `customer.vehium.com`.

## Core docs

- [Docs home](https://docs.vehium.com/): choose your app
- [Workshop app overview](https://docs.vehium.com/workshop/)
- [Customer app overview](https://docs.vehium.com/customer/)

## Workshop app (Vehium Workshop)

- [Getting started](https://docs.vehium.com/workshop/getting-started/): sign up, first login, onboarding
- [Account & billing](https://docs.vehium.com/workshop/account/): profile, password, subscription, invoices
- [Dashboard](https://docs.vehium.com/workshop/dashboard/): the home screen
- [Clients](https://docs.vehium.com/workshop/clients/): add, edit, search, client detail
- [Vehicles](https://docs.vehium.com/workshop/vehicles/): vehicle records, photos, MOT reminders
- [Services](https://docs.vehium.com/workshop/services/): service catalog, appointments
- [Invoices](https://docs.vehium.com/workshop/invoices/): tenant-wide invoice list, quick date ranges, status filter, search, bulk-export to accountant CSV (per-VAT-rate columns) or multi-PDF bundle
- [Employees](https://docs.vehium.com/workshop/employees/): staff management and permissions
- [Reports](https://docs.vehium.com/workshop/reports/): revenue, service volume, exports
- [Settings](https://docs.vehium.com/workshop/settings/): workshop profile, integrations, notifications
- [Desktop app](https://docs.vehium.com/workshop/desktop/): installing the Windows/macOS build
- [Release notes](https://docs.vehium.com/workshop/release-notes/)
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.vehium.com/workshop/troubleshooting/)

## Customer app (Vehium — for vehicle owners)

- [Overview](https://docs.vehium.com/customer/)
- [Getting started](https://docs.vehium.com/customer/getting-started/): sign up, email verification, password
- [Pair with your workshop](https://docs.vehium.com/customer/getting-started/pairing/): automatic pairing by email
- [Your vehicles](https://docs.vehium.com/customer/vehicles/): the vehicles list and detail pages
- [Service history](https://docs.vehium.com/customer/service-history/): every logged service, invoices, PDF export
- [MOT reminders](https://docs.vehium.com/customer/mot/): reminder schedule, MOT history
- [Photos](https://docs.vehium.com/customer/photos/): workshop photos and your own uploads
- [Account](https://docs.vehium.com/customer/account/): profile, password, theme, export, deletion
- [Notifications](https://docs.vehium.com/customer/notifications/): push and email, fine-tune categories
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.vehium.com/customer/troubleshooting/)

## Legal & Reference

- [Privacy policy](https://vehium.com/privacy.html)
- [Terms of service](https://vehium.com/tos.html)
- [FAQ](https://vehium.com/faq.html)

- [Full documentation as a single markdown file](https://docs.vehium.com/llms-full.txt) — every page of docs concatenated, for LLM ingestion
